titleStmt.title: SII 16.27: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 27. (A.R. No. 125 of 1917.) PĀTŪRU, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the Hanumān pillar set up in front of the Vishṇu temple.

The record is dated in Śaka 1344, Śārvari, Phālguṇa śu. 15, Thursday. Śaka 1344, however, corresponds to Śubhakṛit. If Śārvari is a mistake for Śubhakṛit, the details regularly correspond to 1423 A.D., February 25.

It registers the grant of a piece of land in the village Prāntūru towards the south of the river Kṛishṇā to Koṇḍḍūri Rāmānuja by prince Rāmachandra, son of king Dēvarāya. The gift was made by Chenukāli Kēśava, the agent of the prince.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmacaṁdrāya na
maḥ . svasti śrī jayābhyuda
ya śakavaruṣaṁbulu 13
44 Agunēṁṭi śā¨rvvari saṁvvatsa
ra phālguṇa śu 15 ru . śrī vīraprathi
tapratāpamahimā śrīdēvarā
yātmajō rājēṁdraḥ khalu rāmacaṁ
dranṛpati ¨rddhārānupū¨rvaṁ mu
dā . śrī nārāyaṇa vuṁḍḍavelli
kṛtē sākṣiṇi śrī koṁḍḍū ri The ‘ū’ sign is given to the subscript.
purābhidhānakavatō rāmānuja
syādarāt . 1 . datvā kṣētrama
sma sahitaṁ gōca¨rmmasaṁkhyā
mitaṁ cōddha¨rttuṁ sa tadādi
dēśa sadayaṁ cenukāli kēsaprabhu
ṁ . sōpi śrī cenukālikēśavavibhuḥ
kṛṣṇānadī dakṣiṇē . prāṁttūrīpu
ri tatsthalaṁ paridadau Ācaṁdra
tārāgaṇaṁ . 2 . Ēkaiva bhaginī
lōkē sa¨rvvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ [.]
na bhōgyā na karagrāhyā viprada
ttā vasuṁdharā . svadattāṁ pa
radattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁ
dharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . śrī
rāmacaṁdradatti . maṁgaḷa
mahā śrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
